# ReadThisSheet!

> ReadThisSheet! is an Android-first augmented score reader and symbolic music-analysis tutor in active development.

ReadThisSheet! turns a photographed, scanned, PDF, or MusicXML score into an inspectable musical surface. The user verifies recognition uncertainty, corrects notation, and explores evidence-linked notes, rhythm, harmony, cadences, voices, motifs, form, playback, and practice cues on the source page.

## Important distinctions

- Recognition, canonical notation, analysis, explanation, and presentation are separate stages.
- The product exposes uncertainty and alternative interpretations.
- Deterministic explanations and core inspection are designed to work offline after recognition assets are available.
- Audiveris is one optional sidecar provider behind a replaceable recognition interface.
- Current commercial offers on the landing page are proposals until attached to live RevenueCat offerings.

## Canonical product documents

- / — product overview and proposed launch offers
- Repository: private during active development
